blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Dawson's half-century helps England recover from horror start. Liam Dawson makes 68 from 83 balls to help England recover from 107-6 to 228-7 after sharing a hundred partnership with Joe Root at Edgbaston during the first one-day international against India.
